title: Collections, Taxonomy, Ordering, Navigation, Feeds, and Sitemaps
description: Navigation depends on filesystem order, tags differ by case, drafts leak into feeds, pagination duplicates pages, orphan content is invisible, and sitemap URLs disagree with canonical routes. Learners cumulatively produce reconciled accessible site graph and derived publications through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select published documents by typed metadata, language, route, taxonomy, and time under deterministic query and ordering rules.
Normalize tag and category identity separately from labels, aliases, hierarchy, route, and language.
Build global, local, breadcrumb, previous-next, related, and multiple-way navigation from an acyclic visible route graph.
